exact_contracts.range: 10 + 10 per contiguous lower lifter whose own position is not indirectly powered; stop at first opaque cube
exact_contracts.power: indirect power at the lifter or the block immediately above
exact_contracts.nbt: counter, rangeAbove, requiresUpdate and lastPowerState are transient
exact_contracts.inventory_glow: top volume 0.01..0.99 at Y 0.9..0.99 color 0x00A000; side volume Y 0.1..0.9 color 0xEECCFF
exact_contracts.particle: FXSparkle size 1, type 3, multiplier 6, gravity -0.3, lifetime 18, alpha 0.75, fullbright, slowdown 0.908
exact_contracts.recipe: WEW / BNB / WAW; Greatwood, Terra shard, iron, Nitor, Aer shard; Aer 10 Terra 5
exact_contracts.research: LEVITATOR, ARTIFICE -3,-3, complexity 1, Motus 3 Volatus 3 Aer 3, parent NITOR, concealed
exact_contracts.particle_density: ClientProxy gate nextInt(6) < particleCount(2): ALL 4/6, DECREASED 2/6, MINIMAL 0/6; green RNG is consumed after the gate

modern_adaptations: The original global client Shift query is represented by synchronized per-entity isShiftKeyDown so dedicated-server movement remains authoritative.
Legacy lightmap brightness 180 is represented as Forge model block_light 11 (180 >> 4) on active glow elements.
Legacy isOpaqueCube is represented by BlockState.isSolidRender.
A POWERED blockstate property exists only to synchronize the original live-powered glow brightness to modern baked models.
proof_boundary: Source/resource/static closure is not a substitute for a successful Gradle build and actual client/dedicated-server/GameTest runtime evidence.
